ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution's unit */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the institution is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the institution is located */,
  "adm_rate" REAL /* Admission rate of the institution */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in tuition fee from previous year */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution size */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the institution is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "public_private" TEXT /* Indicates whether the institution is public or private */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Total endowment of the institution */,
  "research_expenditure" REAL /* Annual research expenditure */,
  "campus_size" REAL /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees (including non-faculty) */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "ethnic_diversity_score" REAL /* Score indicating ethnic diversity */,
  "gender_diversity_score" REAL /* Score indicating gender diversity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES institution_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES institution_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution type */,
  "accreditation_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether accreditation is required for this type of institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the region (e.g., developing, developed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., MD, CA) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "education_budget" REAL /* Annual education budget of the state */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution size */,
  "min_students" INTEGER /* Minimum number of students for the size category */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students for the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the enrollment data was collected */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of the institution */,
  "full_time_enrollment" INTEGER /* Full-time enrollment of the institution */,
  "part_time_enrollment" INTEGER /* Part-time enrollment of the institution */,
  "male_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "international_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "ethnic_diversity" REAL /* Ethnic diversity score for the year */,
  "gender_diversity" REAL /* Gender diversity score for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., bachelor's, master's) */,
  "degree_field" TEXT /* Field of the degree (e.g., engineering, business) */,
  "degree_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the degree program in years */,
  "degree_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the degree program */,
  "job_placement_rate" REAL /* Job placement rate for graduates of the degree program */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average starting salary for graduates of the degree program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the faculty data was collected */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total faculty of the institution */,
  "full_time_faculty" INTEGER /* Full-time faculty of the institution */,
  "part_time_faculty" INTEGER /* Part-time faculty of the institution */,
  "male_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of male faculty members */,
  "female_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of female faculty members */,
  "international_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of international faculty members */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of faculty members */,
  "average_experience" REAL /* Average years of experience of faculty members */,
  "phd_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of faculty with a Ph.D. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the student data was collected */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total students of the institution */,
  "full_time_students" INTEGER /* Full-time students of the institution */,
  "part_time_students" INTEGER /* Part-time students of the institution */,
  "male_students" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_students" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of students */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "graduation_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the graduation rate data was collected */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the institution */,
  "male_graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate for male students */,
  "female_graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate for female students */,
  "international_graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate for international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_rates" (
  "retention_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention rate record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the retention rate data was collected */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate of the institution */,
  "male_retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate for male students */,
  "female_retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate for female students */,
  "international_retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate for international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_rates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_accessed_institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last institution accessed by the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Detailed activity performed by the user (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the institution (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_user_roles_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., yearly, quarterly) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last data update */,
  "data_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
